mapper.select: SELECT es.id, es.plant_id, p.name AS plant_name, es.target_month, es.electricity_score, es.gas_score, es.water_score, es.solar_score, es.peak_score, es.carbon_score, es.total_score, es.grade FROM esg_scores es JOIN plants p ON p.id = es.plant_id WHERE es.plant_id = #{plantId} ORDER BY es.target_month DESC, es.id DESC LIMIT 1
